description: The state of being complete, undivided, and intact in one's essential nature. Wholeness encompasses physical completeness, spiritual integrity, and the recognition that all parts are necessary for the health of the whole.
sound_symbolism: The vast breath 'who' encompasses all - like wind gathering every leaf, wholeness excludes nothing. This all-embracing quality opens through 'a', acknowledging that true wholeness includes space, includes possibility, includes what is yet to come. The vowel flow from round 'o' to open 'a' traces wholeness expanding - from perfect circle to infinite field. Two syllables hold completeness: the gathering breath and the boundless opening.
image_prompt: Art Nouveau watercolor in Mucha style: Complete circular forms in palest gold and soft lavender containing all elements without depicting objects. Abstract unified fields in powder blue and barely-there coral where every part reflects the totality. Transparent overlapping spheres in cream and mint showing Indra's net of interconnection. Delicate organic patterns flow continuously without breaks or boundaries. Whispers of peach and rose mark the seamless integration of all aspects. All extremely soft pastels. Wet-on-wet technique emphasizes undivided flow where nothing is excluded or separate.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun (wholeness), adjective (whole/complete), and verb (to become whole/to make whole) without morphological change, similar to Mandarin wánzhěng (完整). The verbal usage expresses the process of becoming complete or making something whole.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Wholeness transcends the illusion of separate parts - recognizing that dividing reality into fragments creates suffering. This understanding sees each apparent part as containing the whole, like Indra's net where each jewel reflects all others. True healing comes from remembering our undivided nature, not from fixing isolated symptoms.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Wholeness thinking guides regenerative design - ecosystems thrive when all elements support each other, communities flourish when no one is excluded, solutions work when they address root systems not just visible problems. This holistic approach sees health, justice, and sustainability as inseparable aspects of one thriving whole.
